title: Accounting reconciliation (cash_sol drift elimination)
summary: Add a minimal cash_sol reconciliation path derived from the wallet snapshot and pending_proceeds_sol. Reconciliation clamps cash_sol to max(0, min(wallet_available_sol - pending_proceeds_total, wallet_available_sol)) and emits accounting_reconciled when applied. Runs on startup right after wallet snapshot, and optionally once per cycle when drift exceeds epsilon (entries remain blocked for that cycle when reconciliation is applied). Doctor writes a safe runtime/accounting_snapshot.json artifact and does not write reconciliation into state.json.
why_safe: Reconciliation is conservative: cash_sol is clamped to a wallet-derived upper bound and never increases above wallet.
Entry/exit mechanics are unchanged; this only corrects internal accounting drift and adds observability.
No new external calls are introduced; doctor snapshot uses the wallet balance it already fetches.
commit_message: Reconcile cash_sol to wallet truth and add accounting snapshot
notes_for_cursor: Scope is limited to trader/doctor + focused reconciliation tests and this handoff JSON. Do not add external calls. Do not write reconciliation into state.json.
